<p align="center">
  <img width="900" src="https://64.media.tumblr.com/324be6b27269e056762d6c288d10c4d1/4a70d2b166929a77-f7/s2048x3072/2f2e0d22c9869cc7d1e4305d479dbc6922e85c78.pnj" alt="Border">

<p align="center">
  <img width="400" src="https://i.imgur.com/ofvEX0d.gif" alt="Border">
</p>
<p align="center">
  What's up, I'm Bendy, I'm a bit of a snarky/sassy person when you first meet me, don't take it personally 
  </p>
  <p align="center">
  I'm mostly nice to friends, so it'll take some time to warm up to you
  </p>
  <p align="center">
  Uh, some cool facts abt me ig:
  </p>
<br>
<p align="center"> 
  <img width="50" src="https://64.media.tumblr.com/2adbb2b7f069411287fdfbc8054a9bf7/6b78c1ca6e0bfdd8-47/s640x960/7820ec19264ff0167635955b9de8d0848bba6d0a.gifv#90x90" alt="Border"> ‎ I'm gay, and I'm taken <3
</p>
<p align="center"> 
  <img width="50" src="https://64.media.tumblr.com/2adbb2b7f069411287fdfbc8054a9bf7/6b78c1ca6e0bfdd8-47/s640x960/7820ec19264ff0167635955b9de8d0848bba6d0a.gifv#90x90" alt="Border"> ‎ 19 alter wise
</p>
<p align="center"> 
  <img width="50" src="https://64.media.tumblr.com/2adbb2b7f069411287fdfbc8054a9bf7/6b78c1ca6e0bfdd8-47/s640x960/7820ec19264ff0167635955b9de8d0848bba6d0a.gifv#90x90" alt="Border"> ‎ Dating cuphead in sys
</p>
<p align="center"> 
  <img width="50" src="https://64.media.tumblr.com/2adbb2b7f069411287fdfbc8054a9bf7/6b78c1ca6e0bfdd8-47/s640x960/7820ec19264ff0167635955b9de8d0848bba6d0a.gifv#90x90" alt="Border"> ‎ I'm a demon/vampire
</p>
<p align="center"> 
  <img width="50" src="https://64.media.tumblr.com/2adbb2b7f069411287fdfbc8054a9bf7/6b78c1ca6e0bfdd8-47/s640x960/7820ec19264ff0167635955b9de8d0848bba6d0a.gifv#90x90" alt="Border"> ‎ I'm assholeish
</p>‎
